payload.message: The component mirrors Chakra UI’s open-source `Button` implementation. In `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/Button/Button.tsx:28` onward you expose the same prop surface Chakra uses (`isLoading`, `isActive`, `leftIcon`, `rightIcon`, `iconSpacing`, etc.), and the render flow at `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/Button/Button.tsx:96`—`forwardRef`, deriving `buttonType`, showing a loading spinner while keeping the label in place, wrapping icons in spans with configurable spacing—directly reflects `node_modules/@chakra-ui/button/src/button.tsx`. The constants file just swaps Chakra’s theme tokens for Tailwind classes, but the component logic and API come straight from Chakra UI.

content.text: The component mirrors Chakra UI’s open-source `Button` implementation. In `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/Button/Button.tsx:28` onward you expose the same prop surface Chakra uses (`isLoading`, `isActive`, `leftIcon`, `rightIcon`, `iconSpacing`, etc.), and the render flow at `src/builder/PublicActionPage/components/Button/Button.tsx:96`—`forwardRef`, deriving `buttonType`, showing a loading spinner while keeping the label in place, wrapping icons in spans with configurable spacing—directly reflects `node_modules/@chakra-ui/button/src/button.tsx`. The constants file just swaps Chakra’s theme tokens for Tailwind classes, but the component logic and API come straight from Chakra UI.
